headline: ROTATION CONFIRMATION post-correction baseline 48.4 (Functional band). Patient-safety mission documented (Patient SafetyNet continuous monitoring; SafetyNet COVID telehealth; St Luke's 10-year clinical use). Sustainalytics ESG Risk: 'Average' management of material ESG risk. February 2026 Danaher acquisition agreement ($9.9B) is a pending material transaction — not yet closed. No discrete in-window April 14-28 event for Masimo standalone. Confirmation appropriate at 48.4. Confidence LOW because no individual evidence-based assessment has been conducted; rotation confirmation only.

evidence.finding: Masimo ESG Material Risk management: 'Average' rating.
Danaher agreed to acquire Masimo for $9.9B (announced February 2026; not yet closed).
ESG receives oversight at Chairman/CEO and Board level; mission centered on patient safety, outcomes, experience.
Sustained clinical deployment of Patient SafetyNet — substantive ACT signal.

data_integrity_flag: Scanner cited rotation_state baseline 76.4. Live site/data shows composite 48.4 (post-correction). User input confirms 48.4. Live deterministic baseline used.
post_acquisition_re_queue: Re-queue mandatory at Danaher acquisition close — entity governance structure may change materially.
